article_meta.title: Police turned him over to ICE

reasoning: Multiple attribution-rule violations (flagging/paraphrased source content and quoted family dialogue), nonstandard/incorrect bias-type labels, and some missed clear author-level sensational phrasing. Some genuine author-prose bias was correctly targeted, but errors are substantial.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Items 4 and 5 include attributed source language ("said Lena Graber" / "Graber said"), and item 6 contains direct quotes from family; these should not be flagged as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: About half the items are improperly flagged due to attribution issues; remaining items (1–3) are defensible as emotional/sympathetic framing in author prose.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-level sensational or loaded phrasing like the headline/subhed "hail of bullets," "yawning dread," and "ripped apart by rounds," and subjective "controversial" descriptors.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: All labels used are outside the allowed set (e.g., "Emotional Appeal / Sympathy Bias," "Framing Bias"); even when the bias identification is reasonable, the type labels are not from the defined list.
